zh.Traînel, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France: 法國哈帕格-亞登奧布特拉i爾
zh.Courgenay, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comt: 法國布格-福朗-可特艾庫格尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gillette de Trainel於大約1155年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布特拉i爾時，她的母親Elisabeth de Marigny22歲，父親Garnier II de Trainel27歲。她於1175年與Hugues de Vergy結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1224年2月20日在法國哈帕格特拉i爾享年70歲。

zh-hans.Traînel, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France: 法国哈帕格-亞登奧布特拉i爾
zh-hans.Courgenay, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comt: 法国布格-福朗-可特艾庫格尼
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gillette de Trainel于大约1155年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布特拉i爾时，她的母亲Elisabeth de Marigny22岁，父亲Garnier II de Trainel27岁。她于1175年与Hugues de Vergy结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1224年2月20日在法国哈帕格特拉i爾享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Trainel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): occupational name for a trapper, from Middle English trainer ‘trapper of wild animals’, an agent derivative of trainen ‘to set a trap or snare’. See Train and compare Trapp .
Altered form of German Trainer, a habitational name for someone from Train in Bavaria or Trainau in Upper Franconia.

variants.name: Trainor
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Brendan, Ciaran, Finbar.
Irish (Ulster): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Tréinfhir ‘son of Tréanfhear’, a byname meaning ‘warrior, champion’, from tréan ‘strong’ + fear ‘man’.

variants.name: Train
meanings: from Middle English train(e) ‘trap, snare’ (Old French traine), perhaps a nickname for a trapper. See Trainer .
nickname from northern Middle English tran(e) ‘crane’ (Old Norse trani), perhaps also used as a personal name.

nameMeanings.name: Gillette
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Gillett  , with spelling altered and stress shifted as if it were a modern French name (see 2 below).
French: variant of   Gillet   and, in North America, a variant of its altered form   Gillett  .

variants.name: Gillett
meanings: English: when pronounced with a soft G (/dʒ/), it is usually from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Gillet, Gilot, Giliot, or Geliot. These are diminutives of Gille or Gilly, which are commonly pet forms of the (often female) name Gilian, Gelian (see Gillian ). Gilot and Gillet are also probably pet forms of Giles .

English (of Norman origin): when pronounced with hard G, it is more likely from the Middle English personal name Gilot, a borrowing of Old French Guillot, a pet form of Guillaume (see William ) and a doublet of Willett .

English: habitational name from one or other of the numerous minor places called Gillhead, such as those in the parishes of Matterdale, Moresby, Castle Sowerby, and Westward (all Cumberland), formed from Middle English gil(le) ‘ravine, narrow valley’ (Old Norse gil) + hed, heved ‘head’. This would become Gillett, with hard g.

en.lifeSummary: When Gillette de Trainel was born about 1155, in Traînel, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, her mother, Elisabeth de Marigny, was 22 and her father, Garnier II de Trainel, was 27. She married Hugues de Vergy in 1175. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 20 February 1224, in Traînel, Champagne, France, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gillette de Trainel est née environ 1155, à Traînel, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, sa mère, Elisabeth de Marigny, avait 22 ans et son père, Garnier II de Trainel, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Hugues de Vergy en 1175. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 février 1224, à Traînel, Champagne, France, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gillette de Trainel um 1155 in Traînel, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihre Mutter Elisabeth de Marigny 22 und ihr Vater Garnier II de Trainel 27. Sie hat 1175 Hugues de Vergy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Februar 1224 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Traînel, Champagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gillette de Trainel è nata il circa 1155 nel Traînel, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, sua madre, Elisabeth de Marigny, aveva 22 anni e sua padre, Garnier II de Trainel, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Hugues de Vergy nel 1175. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 febbraio 1224, nel Traînel, Champagne, Francia, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gillette de Trainelが約1155年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベトラiネルで生まれた時，母Elisabeth de Marignyは22歳，父Garnier II de Trainelは27歳であった。1175年にHugues de Vergyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1224年2月20日にフランスチャンプアグントラiネルで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gillette de Trainel(이)가 대략 1155년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 트라i넬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth de Marigny(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 아버지 Garnier II de Trainel(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1175년 Hugues de Vergy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1224년 2월 20일 프랑스 챔파그니 트라i넬에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gillette de Trainel nasceu aproximadamente 1155, em Traînel, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França, sua mãe, Elisabeth de Marigny, tinha 22 anos e seu pai, Garnier II de Trainel, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugues de Vergy em 1175. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1224, em Traînel, Champagne, França, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gillette de Trainel родилась около 1155 г. в местности траiнель, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция, её матери по имени Elisabeth de Marigny было 22 года, а отцу, которого звали Garnier II de Trainel, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugues de Vergy в 1175 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 20 февраля 1224 г. в местности траiнель, чампагн, Франция в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gillette de Trainel nació aproximadamente 1155, en Traînel, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su mamá, Elisabeth de Marigny, tenía 22 años y su papá, Garnier II de Trainel, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Hugues de Vergy en 1175. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de febrero de 1224, en Traînel, Champagne, Francia, a la edad de 70 años.
